The things you have to study and learn.

So first of all, we will focus on Perceptron and understand it in and out. After that, we will move to Multilayer Perceptron or you can say ANN.

chunks.text: What is its geometric intuition? And we will run it in code. After that, we will learn how to train Perceptron. Because just like any other machine learning or deep learning algorithm, it also has training. And once we learn how it is trained,

chunks.text: after that I will tell you what was the problem in Perceptron, which stopped the growth of Perceptron and due to which Multilayer Perceptron was needed. And then we will start Multilayer Perceptron. So I honestly want to talk to you about this. Without studying Perceptron, don't study Multilayer Perceptron.

chunks.text: Okay. Now the work of the activation function is to bring your Z in a given range. Okay. Now that range can be anything. It can be minus 1 to 1.
